page: Microsoft Azure D192ds_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine belonging to the Ddsv6 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 192 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 96 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8573C processor operating at 4.2 GHz. The x86_64 architecture is supported by 768.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. The instance includes a substantial 11,339 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable, though it does not include any GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Benchmark results demonstrate top-tier multi-core capabilities, with stress-ng multi-core CPU performance, Geekbench multi-core, and PassMark CPU scores all ranking in the top 10% tier. Memory bandwidth is highly efficient, achieving top-tier status in both small-block cached and large-block uncached read/write operations. Single-core performance is more moderate, with stress-ng single-core and bzip3 single-threaded decompression scoring in the average middle 50% tier, indicating a clear tradeoff where the server's strength lies in highly parallelized execution rather than single-threaded speed.

The Intel Xeon processor provides advanced instruction sets, including AVX-512 and Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX) for tile and int8 operations. These hardware features translate to strong performance in LLM inference tasks, particularly for prompt processing across small, medium, and large models. The server also excels in database operations, software compilation, and static web serving throughput, all of which achieved top-tier benchmark rankings. This profile makes the instance highly suitable for large-scale databases, parallel software development, and high-throughput web serving workloads.
description: Microsoft Azure D192ds_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine from the Ddsv6 family, powered by a 192-vCPU Intel Xeon 8573C processor running at 4.2 GHz on Microsoft Hyper-V. It features 768.0 GB of RAM, 11,339 GB of local storage, and supports Premium Storage, with no integrated GPUs. The server delivers top-tier multi-core performance, memory bandwidth, and database operations, though single-core execution remains in the average tier. Equipped with Intel AMX and AVX-512 instruction sets, it achieves strong results in LLM inference and software compilation. This high-density resource profile is well-suited for parallelized enterprise workloads, large databases, and high-throughput web serving.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D192ds_v6 is a general-purpose VM featuring 192 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 768 GB RAM, and 11,339 GB of local storage, delivering top-tier multi-core and database performance.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure D192ds_v6 is a 192-vCPU Intel Xeon general-purpose VM with 768 GB RAM and 11,339 GB of local storage for high-throughput workloads.
tagline: A high-core-density general-purpose platform featuring massive local storage and advanced matrix extensions for parallelized enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 192 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs and 768 GB of system memory.
11,339 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability.
Top-tier multi-core CPU, memory bandwidth, and database performance.
Intel AMX and AVX-512 hardware acceleration for vector and matrix operations.
Optimized for large-scale databases, software compilation, and web serving.
